name: pytorch-lightning
tagline: Reference skill for structuring PyTorch training code with Lightning: LightningModule, Trainer, DataModules, callbacks, logging, distributed
verdict: Clean, well-scoped instructional skill for the PyTorch Lightning framework. No credential access, no network exfiltration, no shell-piped remote code, no hidden or manipulative instructions. Only installs the standard PyPI `lightning` package. Minor gaps: no explicit negative-trigger guidance and no failure-path/error-handling notes, neither of which poses a

highlights.summary: No explicit negative-trigger guidance (e.g. when to use plain PyTorch, Keras, or another framework instead); a user could misapply the skill to non-Lightning PyTorch work without being told otherwise.
No guidance on failure paths (e.g. install failures, CUDA mismatch, version incompatibility beyond the one NeptuneLogger removal note at line 107).
